title: DocumentVault
description: A profile's structured wallet of important documents and stored receipts (FR-DOC-002). Provided by Module 12 to Workspace, Tasks, Inbox, and Travel. Documents are metadata + a reference to encrypted object storage (never inline content). Every cross-profile read is authZ-checked server-side against session identity (threat model). Money fields are integer minor units (MoneyCents); no binary float. Each externally-sourced or OCR-derived value carries a FreshnessStamp. NOTE: consumers receive document METADATA and capability-scoped access grants, never raw bytes or storage credentials.

profile_id.description: Owning profile. Server derives the acting identity from the validated session; a client-supplied profile_id is NEVER trusted for authZ (threat model, FR-X-010).
Redundant owner scoping for row-level-security enforcement.

category.description: Structured category (FR-DOC-002). 'receipt' and 'warranty' documents may carry receipt_link_ref / warranty_ref.

title.description: User-facing title; bilingual display labels are resolved at the edge via @finos/format, but a user-entered title is stored as-is.

document_type_key.description: Canonical i18n key for the document type; resolved to EN/FR labels at the edge. A type surfaced to users in only one language is a bilingual defect (Constitution II).

storage_ref.description: Reference to the encrypted object in Canadian-region object storage. NEVER the bytes, NEVER a storage credential or signed URL (those are minted per-request, per-grant, server-side).

object_key.description: Opaque storage key; not a public URL.

encryption.description: Per-subject field/object key envelope enabling crypto-shred deletion (FR-X-013/019).

region.description: Canadian-region residency (FR-X-020). Cross-border storage is prohibited without disclosure + agreement.

amount.description: Optional document amount (e.g. receipt total) in integer cents. Present for receipts; OCR-derived amounts carry source='ocr' freshness and are user-confirmable.

amount_source.description: Provenance of amount for explainability (FR-X-006). 'ocr' amounts are provisional until confirmed; an OCR amount is never treated as a settled money figure.

document_date.description: Date on the document (purchase date, policy date). Stored as a calendar date; rendered to locale at the edge.

merchant_ref.description: Resolved MerchantGraph node, when the document is tied to a merchant (receipt/warranty).

receipt_link_ref.description: ReceiptLink id when this receipt is linked to a transaction (see ReceiptLinks contract).

warranty_ref.description: Warranty id when this document is a warranty (see WarrantyReminders contract).

source.description: Provenance. 'email_inferred' documents (e.g. a warranty PDF received via a connected email source) are subject to the FR-X-013 email-revocation purge; when set, email_sourced MUST be true.

email_sourced.description: true iff this document's sole/primary source is a connected email; purged within 7 days on email-access revocation regardless of store (FR-X-013).

sharing.description: Export/sharing controls (FR-DOC-002). Default is private-to-owner; any grant is least-privilege and every access is audited.

visibility.description: private = owner only; household_scoped = visible per Household MemberScope; explicit_grant = named grants only.

grants.description: Explicit, least-privilege grants. Enforced server-side; UI filtering alone is non-compliant (FR-X-010).

capability.description: view = read metadata + render; export = download/share the underlying file. No grant implies write/delete.

created_at.description: UTC instant the document was stored.

freshness.description: Freshness of the OCR/linking enrichment and any externally-sourced fields. For pure user-uploads, source='user_entered'.
